error.file_too_large: File size must be less than 5MB

notification_recipients.title: Notification Recipients

report.title: Report User
report.report_title_placeholder: Example: This user is spreading spam

warning_items.one: Reports must be based on facts and clear evidence.
warning_items.two: Submitting false reports may result in penalties.
warning_items.three: Reports will be reviewed by our team within 1–3 business days.
